About Dataset¶

The Bangalore EEG Epilepsy Dataset (BEED) is a comprehensive EEG collection for epileptic seizure detection and classification. Recorded at a neurological research centre in Bangalore, India, it features high-fidelity EEG signals captured using the standard 10-20 electrode system at a 256 Hz sampling rate. BEED contains 16,000 segments of 20-second EEG recordings evenly distributed across four categories: Healthy Subjects (0), Generalized Seizures (1), Focal Seizures (2), and Seizure Events (3), where seizure activity occurs with events like eye blinking, nail biting, or staring. The dataset comprises 16 EEG channels (X1-X16) corresponding to different brain regions, with a binary label (y) indicating:

  • Healthy Subjects (0)

  • Generalized Seizures (1)

  • Focal Seizures (2)

  • Seizure Events (3)

The Deep learning and hybrid models were applied for classification. Performance was evaluated using Accuracy, Precision, Recall, F1 Score, and Matthews Correlation Coefficient (MCC) and, Hard voting SpiderGRU-ANN model achieved the best performance across all metrics, with 99.18% accuracy and 98.891% MCC, outperforming standalone ML models as this table.

In [1]:
import numpy as np
import pandas as pd 
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import tensorflow as tf
import keras
import time
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
from keras.models import Sequential, Model
from keras.layers import (
    Dense, Dropout, Flatten, Conv1D, AveragePooling1D, MaxPooling1D, 
    LSTM, GRU, Bidirectional, Activation, BatchNormalization,
    SpatialDropout1D, SeparableConv1D, Input, Concatenate
)
from keras.utils import plot_model
from keras import optimizers, losses

from tensorflow.keras import layers, regularizers

from sklearn.metrics import (
    accuracy_score, precision_score, recall_score, f1_score,
    matthews_corrcoef, classification_report, confusion_matrix
)

import warnings
warnings.filterwarnings('ignore')

In [7]:
# ----------------- X= Features & Y = Target -----------------
X = df.iloc[: ,:-1].values
Y = df['y'].values
In [8]:
from sklearn.preprocessing import LabelEncoder
le = LabelEncoder()
df['y'] = le.fit_transform(df['y'])
In [9]:
# ----------------- Train-Test Split -----------------
from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split
x_train, x_test, y_train, y_test = train_test_split(X, Y,test_size=.20,random_state=22, shuffle=True)
x_train.shape, y_train.shape, x_test.shape, y_test.shape
Out[9]:
((6400, 16), (6400, 4), (1600, 16), (1600, 4))
In [10]:
#1-ANN
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_0 = Sequential()

# Input layer and first hidden layer
model_0.add(Dense(256, activation='relu', input_shape=(16,))) 
model_0.add(Dropout(0.2))

# Additional hidden layers
model_0.add(Dense(128, activation='relu'))
model_0.add(Dropout(0.3))
model_0.add(Dense(128, activation='relu'))
model_0.add(Dropout(0.2))
model_0.add(Dense(64, activation='relu'))
model_0.add(Dropout(0.2))

# Output layer
model_0.add(Dense(4, activation='softmax'))  # Assuming 4-class classification

# Summary & Plot
model_0.summary()
plot_model(model_0, to_file="ann_model.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_0.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)
model_0.save("Ann_model.h5")
# -------------------- Model Training --------------------
start_train_time = time.time()
history = model_0.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")

# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test = model_0.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true = y_test.argmax(axis=1)

end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")


accuracy = accuracy_score(y_true, y_pred_test)
precision = precision_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
recall = recall_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
f1 = f1_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
mcc = matthews_corrcoef(y_true, y_pred_test)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy)
print("Precision Score:", precision)
print("Recall Score:", recall)
print("F1 Score:", f1)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true, y_pred_test))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm = confusion_matrix(y_true, y_pred_test)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: ANN Model (model_0)")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# -------------------- Training History Plots --------------------
plt.plot(history.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy (model_0)')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Validation'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss (model_0)')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Validation'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential"

In [11]:
#CNN_LSTM
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_1 = Sequential()

# Conv1D Layer
model_1.add(Conv1D(128, kernel_size=3, activation='relu', input_shape=(16, 1)))
model_1.add(AveragePooling1D(pool_size=2))
model_1.add(Dropout(0.01))
model_1.add(Dense(128, activation='relu'))
model_1.add(Dropout(0.2))
# LSTM Layers
model_1.add(LSTM(units=256, return_sequences=True))
model_1.add(LSTM(units=32))
model_1.add(Dropout(0.01))

# Dense Layers
model_1.add(Flatten())
model_1.add(Dense(128, activation='relu'))
model_1.add(Dropout(0.01))
model_1.add(Dense(4))  # Assuming 4-class classification
model_1.add(Activation('softmax'))

# Summary & Plot
model_1.summary()
plot_model(model_1, to_file="model.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_1.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Model Training --------------------

start_train_time = time.time()


history = model_1.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)

end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")

# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test = model_1.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true = y_test.argmax(axis=1)

end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

accuracy_a = accuracy_score(y_true, y_pred_test)
precision_a = precision_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
recall_a = recall_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
f1_a = f1_score(y_true, y_pred_test, average='weighted')
mcc_a = matthews_corrcoef(y_true, y_pred_test)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy_a)
print("Precision Score:", precision_a)
print("Recall Score:", recall_a)
print("F1 Score:", f1_a)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc_a)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true, y_pred_test))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm = confusion_matrix(y_true, y_pred_test)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: LSTM-CNN Hybrid Model")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()



plt.plot(history.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential_1"

In [60]:
# LSTM
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_2 = Sequential()
model_2.add(LSTM(units=256, return_sequences=True, input_shape=(16, 1)))  # Input shape added here
model_2.add(LSTM(units=128))
model_2.add(Dropout(0.01))
model_2.add(Flatten())
model_2.add(Dense(128, activation='relu'))
model_2.add(Dropout(0.01))
model_2.add(Dense(4))  # 4 output classes
model_2.add(Activation('softmax'))
# Summary & Plot
model_2.summary()
plot_model(model_2, to_file="model2.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_2.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------

start_train_time = time.time()
history_2 = model_2.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")
# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test_2 = model_2.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_2 = y_test.argmax(axis=1)
end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")



accuracy2 = accuracy_score(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2)
precision2 = precision_score(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2, average='weighted')
recall2 = recall_score(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2, average='weighted')
f1_2 = f1_score(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2, average='weighted')
mcc2 = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy2)
print("Precision Score:", precision2)
print("Recall Score:", recall2)
print("F1 Score:", f1_2)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc2)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_2 = confusion_matrix(y_true_2, y_pred_test_2)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_2, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: LSTM")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()


plt.plot(history.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential_11"

In [59]:
#CNN
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_3 =Sequential()
model_3.add(Conv1D(256, kernel_size=5, strides=1, padding='same', activation='relu', input_shape=(X.shape[1], 1)))


model_3.add(Conv1D(64, kernel_size=5, activation='relu'))
model_3.add(MaxPooling1D(2)) 

model_3.add(SeparableConv1D(256, kernel_size=5, activation='relu'))
model_3.add(MaxPooling1D(2)) 



model_3.add(Dropout(0.5))
model_3.add(Flatten())

model_3.add(Dense(512, activation='relu'))   
model_3.add(Dense(4, activation='softmax'))

model_3.compile(loss='categorical_crossentropy', optimizer='adam', metrics=['accuracy'])

# Summary & Plot
model_3.summary()
plot_model(model_3, to_file="model2.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_3.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------

start_train_time = time.time()
history_3 = model_3.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")

# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test_3 = model_3.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_3 = y_test.argmax(axis=1)
end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f"⏱ Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

accuracy3 = accuracy_score(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3)
precision3 = precision_score(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3, average='weighted')
recall3 = recall_score(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3, average='weighted')
f1_3 = f1_score(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3, average='weighted')
mcc3 = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy3)
print("Precision Score:", precision3)
print("Recall Score:", recall3)
print("F1 Score:", f1_3)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc3)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_3 = confusion_matrix(y_true_3, y_pred_test_3)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_3, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix:CNN")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()


plt.plot(history.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential_10"

In [58]:
#GRU
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_4 = Sequential(name="GRU-Model")  # Model
model_4.add(GRU(units=128, input_shape=(16, 1), return_sequences=True))  # First GRU layer
model_4.add(GRU(units=64))  # Second GRU layer (no return_sequences)

model_4.add(Dropout(0.02))  # Regularization
model_4.add(Flatten())  # Flatten for Dense layers
model_4.add(Dense(units=64, activation='relu'))  # Hidden layer
model_4.add(Dropout(0.02))  # Regularization
model_4.add(Dense(units=4))  # Output layer (4 classes)
model_4.add(Activation('softmax'))  # Softmax activation
model_4.summary()

# Summary & Plot
plot_model(model_4, to_file="model4.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_4.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------
start_train_time = time.time()
history_4 = model_4.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")
# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test_4 = model_4.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_4 = y_test.argmax(axis=1)


end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

accuracy4 = accuracy_score(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4)
precision4 = precision_score(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4, average='weighted')
recall4 = recall_score(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4, average='weighted')
f1_4 = f1_score(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4, average='weighted')
mcc4 = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy4)
print("Precision Score:", precision4)
print("Recall Score:", recall4)
print("F1 Score:", f1_4)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc4)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_4 = confusion_matrix(y_true_4, y_pred_test_4)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_4, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: GRU")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# -------------------- Training History Plots --------------------
plt.plot(history_4.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history_4.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history_4.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history_4.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "GRU-Model"

In [65]:
#BiLSTM
# -------------------- Model Architecture --------------------
model_5 = Sequential()

model_5.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(units=256, return_sequences=True), input_shape=(16, 1)))
model_5.add(Dropout(0.2))

model_5.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(units=128)))
model_5.add(Dropout(0.2))

model_5.add(Dense(units=64, activation='relu'))
model_5.add(Dropout(0.2))

model_5.add(Dense(units=4))
model_5.add(Activation('softmax'))

model_5.summary()

tf.keras.utils.plot_model(
    model_5,
    to_file="model_5.png",
    show_shapes=True
)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_5.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss='categorical_crossentropy',
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------
start_train_time = time.time()
history_5 = model_5.fit(
    x_train, y_train, 
    epochs=150, 
    batch_size=32, 
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test), 
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")
# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test_5 = model_5.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_5 = y_test.argmax(axis=1)
end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

accuracy_5 = accuracy_score(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5)
precision_5 = precision_score(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5, average='weighted')
recall_5 = recall_score(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5, average='weighted')
f1_5 = f1_score(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5, average='weighted')
mcc_5 = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy_5)
print("Precision Score:", precision_5)
print("Recall Score:", recall_5)
print("F1 Score:", f1_5)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc_5)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_5 = confusion_matrix(y_true_5, y_pred_test_5)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_5, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: model_5 (Bidirectional LSTM)")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# -------------------- Training History Plots --------------------
plt.plot(history_5.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history_5.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history_5.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history_5.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Test'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential_15"

In [16]:
#CNN-BiLSTM
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
model_6 = Sequential()

# Conv1D Layer
model_6.add(Conv1D(256, 3, activation='relu', input_shape=(16, 1)))
model_6.add(Dropout(0.2))

# Bidirectional LSTM Layers
model_6.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(units=256, return_sequences=True)))
model_6.add(Dropout(0.2))

model_6.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(units=128)))
model_6.add(Dropout(0.2))

# Dense Layers
model_6.add(Dense(units=128, activation='relu'))
model_6.add(Dropout(0.2))

# Output Layer
model_6.add(Dense(units=4))
model_6.add(Activation('softmax'))

# Model Summary
model_6.summary()

# Plot Model Architecture
plot_model(
    model_6,
    to_file="model_6.png",
    show_shapes=True
)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
model_6.compile(
    optimizer="adam",
    loss='categorical_crossentropy',
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------
start_train_time = time.time()
history_6 = model_6.fit(
    x_train, y_train, 
    epochs=150, 
    batch_size=32, 
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test), 
    verbose=1
)
end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")
# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()
y_pred_test_6 = model_6.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_6 = y_test.argmax(axis=1)
end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

accuracy_6 = accuracy_score(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6)
precision_6 = precision_score(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6, average='weighted')
recall_6 = recall_score(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6, average='weighted')
f1_6 = f1_score(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6, average='weighted')
mcc_6 = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy_6)
print("Precision Score:", precision_6)
print("Recall Score:", recall_6)
print("F1 Score:", f1_6)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc_6)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_6 = confusion_matrix(y_true_6, y_pred_test_6)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_6, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: model_6 (CNN-Bidirectional LSTM)")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# -------------------- Training History Plots --------------------
plt.plot(history_6.history['accuracy'])
plt.plot(history_6.history['val_accuracy'])
plt.title('Model accuracy (model_6)')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Validation'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.plot(history_6.history['loss'])
plt.plot(history_6.history['val_loss'])
plt.title('Model loss (model_6)')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(['Train', 'Validation'], loc='upper left')
plt.show()

Model: "sequential_6"

In [33]:
#SpiderGRU
# -------------------- Model Definition --------------------
input_layer = Input(shape=(16, 1), name="Input")

# Leg 1: Deep GRU path
leg1 = GRU(256, return_sequences=True)(input_layer)
leg1 = GRU(64)(leg1)
leg1 = Dropout(0.1)(leg1)

# Leg 2: Shallow GRU + Dense
leg2 = GRU(128)(input_layer)
leg2 = Dense(64, activation='relu')(leg2)
leg2 = Dropout(0.1)(leg2)

# Leg 3: GRU + BatchNorm + Flatten
leg3 = GRU(64, return_sequences=True)(input_layer)
leg3 = BatchNormalization()(leg3)
leg3 = Flatten()(leg3)

# Leg 4: GRU + Dense stack
leg4 = GRU(32)(input_layer)
leg4 = Dense(32, activation='relu')(leg4)

# Merge all legs
merged = concatenate([leg1, leg2, leg3, leg4], name="Spider_Merge")

# Dense layers after merging
dense_out = Dense(128, activation='relu')(merged)
dense_out = Dropout(0.2)(dense_out)
dense_out = Dense(128, activation='relu')(dense_out)

# Output layer
output_layer = Dense(4, activation='softmax', name="Output")(dense_out)

# Final model
spider_model = Model(inputs=input_layer, outputs=output_layer, name="SpiderGRU_Model")
spider_model.summary()

# Save model diagram
plot_model(spider_model, to_file="spider_model.png", show_shapes=True)

# -------------------- Compilation --------------------
spider_model.compile(
    optimizer=Adam(learning_rate=0.001),
    loss="categorical_crossentropy",
    metrics=["accuracy"]
)

# -------------------- Training --------------------
history_spider = spider_model.fit(
    x_train, y_train,
    epochs=150,
    batch_size=32,
    validation_data=(x_test, y_test),
    verbose=1
)

# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
y_pred_test_spider = spider_model.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_true_spider = y_test.argmax(axis=1)

accuracy_spider = accuracy_score(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider)
precision_spider = precision_score(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider, average='weighted')
recall_spider = recall_score(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider, average='weighted')
f1_spider = f1_score(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider, average='weighted')
mcc_spider = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider)

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy_spider)
print("Precision Score:", precision_spider)
print("Recall Score:", recall_spider)
print("F1 Score:", f1_spider)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc_spider)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_spider = confusion_matrix(y_true_spider, y_pred_test_spider)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_spider, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: SpiderGRU_Model")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# -------------------- Training History Plots --------------------
plt.figure()
plt.plot(history_spider.history['accuracy'], label='Train Accuracy')
plt.plot(history_spider.history['val_accuracy'], label='Validation Accuracy')
plt.title('SpiderGRU_Model Accuracy')
plt.ylabel('Accuracy')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(loc='upper left')
plt.show()

plt.figure()
plt.plot(history_spider.history['loss'], label='Train Loss')
plt.plot(history_spider.history['val_loss'], label='Validation Loss')
plt.title('SpiderGRU_Model Loss')
plt.ylabel('Loss')
plt.xlabel('Epoch')
plt.legend(loc='upper left')
plt.show()

In [68]:
#Hard Voting (SpiderGRU-ANN)
# -------------------- Training --------------------
start_train_time = time.time()

# If model training is needed before voting, add training here
# For example: spider_model.fit(...) or model_0.fit(...)

end_train_time = time.time()
training_duration = end_train_time - start_train_time
print(f"\n Training Time: {training_duration:.2f} seconds")

# -------------------- Voting Between spider_model and ANN --------------------

# Predict class labels (Hard Voting)
y_pred_spider = spider_model.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)
y_pred_model0 = model_0.predict(x_test).argmax(axis=1)

# Majority vote (Hard Voting)
import scipy.stats as stats
votes = np.vstack([y_pred_spider, y_pred_model0])
y_pred_test_hard = stats.mode(votes, axis=0, keepdims=False).mode
y_true_hard = y_test.argmax(axis=1)

# -------------------- Predictions & Evaluation --------------------
start_test_time = time.time()

# -------------------- Evaluation --------------------
accuracy_hard = accuracy_score(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard)
precision_hard = precision_score(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard, average='weighted')
recall_hard = recall_score(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard, average='weighted')
f1_hard = f1_score(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard, average='weighted')
mcc_hard = matthews_corrcoef(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard)

end_test_time = time.time()
testing_duration = end_test_time - start_test_time
print(f" Testing Time: {testing_duration:.2f} seconds\n")

print("Accuracy Score:", accuracy_hard)
print("Precision Score:", precision_hard)
print("Recall Score:", recall_hard)
print("F1 Score:", f1_hard)
print("Matthews Correlation Coefficient:", mcc_hard)
print("\nClassification Report:\n", classification_report(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard))

# -------------------- Confusion Matrix --------------------
cm_hard = confusion_matrix(y_true_hard, y_pred_test_hard)
plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
sns.heatmap(cm_hard, annot=True, fmt="d", cmap=plt.cm.Blues, square=True)
plt.title("Confusion Matrix: Hard Voting (SpiderGRU + ANN)")
plt.xlabel("Predicted")
plt.ylabel("Actual")
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
